issues.problem: Defective upstream bundle reported 'NO UPSTREAM WIKI was resolvable' but wikis exist in the repo for Fact_BillingDeposit, Dim_PaymentStatus, Dim_Customer, Dim_Country, Dim_Funnel, Dim_CountryBin, Dim_CardType, Dim_BillingDepot, Dim_Affiliate. ~40 columns should be Tier 1 with verbatim descriptions but are all tagged Tier 2.

Description paraphrases upstream. Upstream: 'Primary distribution key (HASH). Uniquely identifies each deposit attempt. PK in production (Billing.Deposit.DepositID IDENTITY). Clustered index key in DWH.' Wiki: 'Unique identifier for each deposit attempt.' Lost HASH distribution key, IDENTITY, clustered index key.

Upstream has rich enum values: '1=New, 2=Approved (73%), 3=Decline, 5=InProcess, 11=Chargeback, 12=Refund, 13=Pending, 35=DeclineByRRE (10.2%). Full 39-value enum.' Wiki drops all enum values and distributions.
Upstream notes: 'As of 2025-04-17, capped via CASE expression in ETL to prevent extreme outlier values from distorting aggregations.' Wiki drops the ETL capping rule entirely.

Dim-lookup passthroughs cite SP relay (Tier 2 — SP_H_Deposits) instead of root dictionary origin. Country should be Tier 1 — Dictionary.Country, Funnel/FunnelFrom/AcquisitionFunnel should be Tier 1 — Dictionary.Funnel, PaymentStatus_Name should be Tier 1 — Dictionary.PaymentStatus.
Upstream has '69 distinct risk reason codes. Key codes: 1=Success, 35=DeclineByRRE, 47=ML, 49=CustomerToFundingViolation.' Wiki retains NULL semantics but drops all enum details.
No inline enum key=value pairs for PaymentStatus_Name or IsFTD despite upstream wikis documenting them. PaymentStatus has 7+ known values, IsFTD has binary 0/1 with ~60.6% FTD=1 distribution.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with corrected bundle: (1) Include upstream wikis from knowledge/synapse/Wiki/DWH_dbo/Tables/ for Fact_BillingDeposit, Dim_PaymentStatus, Dim_Customer, Dim_Country, Dim_Funnel, Dim_CountryBin, Dim_CardType, Dim_BillingDepot, Dim_Affiliate. (2) Re-tag ~40 columns as Tier 1 with root origins (e.g. Tier 1 — Billing.Deposit, Tier 1 — Dictionary.Country). (3) Copy upstream descriptions VERBATIM — preserve enum values, NULL semantics, ETL cap rules, FK targets. (4) Keep OldPaymentID, Code as Tier 2 (hardcoded NULLs); keep CardSubType, CardCategory as Tier 2 (upstream Dim_CountryBin marks them Tier 2). (5) Add inline enum key=value pairs for PaymentStatusID, IsFTD from upstream wikis.
